prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for pyridine were computed as follows.

Method provenance
Property: Per-atom Fukui functions f⁺ (electrophilic), f⁻ (nucleophilic), f⁰ (radical) and the dual descriptor; most-reactive sites identified.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS, exact four-center integrals; tier “standard”).
Geometry provenance: single-point on the user-supplied pyridine.xyz geometry (no further optimisation).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software: chemkit → PySCF 2.x backend (fukui-reactivity skill).
Convergence & caveats: SCF cycles converged; integrity.status = ok, integrity.trustworthy = true. Warnings returned by the engine are reproduced verbatim below. Density fitting was not used.
